title: CS50 Outtakes 2013
summary: CS50 Outtakes 2013 is a YouTube video from Harvard's CS50 course channel featuring behind-the-scenes and blooper moments from the 2013 course. The content serves as supplementary educational entertainment rather than core technical instruction.
